cases.title: Complete representative workflow satisfies the invariant
cases.invariant: Retries, duplicate messages, resumed tasks and regenerated artifacts preserve exactly-once semantic outcomes where required.
cases.setup: Prepare a representative multi-Batch fixture for Idempotency, replay and deduplication; include valid baselines plus one controlled adversarial or failure condition appropriate to golden_path.
cases.stimulus: Execute the connected workflows spanning Batch 1–65 and evaluate the invariant across every boundary crossed by the case.
cases.expected: Retries, duplicate messages, resumed tasks and regenerated artifacts preserve exactly-once semantic outcomes where required. The golden_path scenario produces a deterministic pass or an explicit blocking finding; no hidden partial success is permitted.
cases.deterministic_oracle: Use schema/parser validation, stable identifiers, stored baseline comparison, explicit state/permission checks, content hashes and recorded runner/tool exit status. LLM interpretation may explain a finding but cannot determine raw pass/fail facts.
required_evidence: Artifact Graph or trace links where applicable
cases.timeout_policy: Use the target Batch budget; timeouts are failures unless the case explicitly validates timeout handling.
cases.retry_policy: At most one infrastructure-only rerun; product failures cannot be erased by rerun.
